lost the use of the dominant hand and must be retrained to use the other hand. Skilled 
nursing visits to re-teach self-administration of the insulin would be reasonable and 
necessary. The patient’s response to teaching must be documented at each home health 
visit, until the patient has learned how to self-administer.
